scene.message: Mark: Kozai!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: That's...{wait_fr:80}{nl} my painting...!{waitkey}{ret}
Queen: I'm not asking a{nl} monkey like you!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Whoa!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Ngh!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Eek!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Agh!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Noo!{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: ...gh!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Chisato, stop!{waitkey}{ret}
How do you answer?{nl} {ctl0e:22}{ret}
Maki: ...{wait_fr:32}...{wait_fr:32}...{wait_fr:32}...{wait_fr:32}...{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: We managed to avoid{nl} being turned to stone.{waitkey}{ret}
